activeFeature.reviewSummary: 0 HIGH across all 11 review passes; ec3.1 MEDIUM (M1) resolved 2026-04-17 via /decisions; ec2.1 MEDIUM resolved in-story during review-2.
activeFeature.testPlanSummary: All 10 stories have test plans + AC verification scripts. ec1.1–ec1.7 derived from a shared migration template (6 tests each). ec2.1: 4 unit. ec2.2: 4 unit. ec3.1: 13 tests (7 unit + 4 integration + 2 NFR).
activeFeature.dorSummary: All 10 stories DoR-signed-off 2026-04-17. 15/15 hard blocks pass each. W4 (domain-expert verification-script review) acknowledged as RISK-ACCEPT in /decisions (solo-operator self-review at PR time). Oversight: 8 Medium (ec1.1–ec1.7 + ec3.1), 2 Low (ec2.1, ec2.2). 20 artefacts in artefacts/2026-04-16-engine-consolidation/dor/ (10 DoR checklists + 10 DoR contracts).
activeFeature.notes: Outer loop (discovery → benefit-metric → definition → review → test-plan → DoR) now complete for all 10 stories. Ready for inner loop (/branch-setup → /implementation-plan → /subagent-execution or /tdd → /verify-completion → /branch-complete).

e2.storyCountAmendment: Amended 2026-04-17: ec3.1 (pipeline-state-isolation) added post-initial-estimate via /decisions Q5 ARCH scope-add. Initial count 9 preserved below in byStory for calibration traceability.

byStory.note: Reflects initial E2 (pre-ec3.1). ec3.1 is complexity 3, Stable scope; operator judged the re-derivation not worth redoing for a single late addition.

e2.notes: No E1 recorded for this feature; E2 produced directly. Work is highly mechanical (move-only per subcomponent with pre/post test parity invariant). Engagement lower than productisation's equivalent because all 7 subcomponent stories are the same template. Assumption: parallel branches merge cleanly (per /decisions Q1).

calibratedComparison.productisationE2: 0.071h/story — 7 stories, 1 day, 25% (forecast; end-of-day estimate came in at 3s total measured time for dogfood)
calibratedComparison.engineConsolidationE2: 0.056h/story — 9 stories, 1 day, 25% (below productisation; mechanical template shape)

calibratedComparison.phase3E2: 0.17h/story — consistent with agent-heavy outer loop; between phase2 anomaly and phase1 reference

phase3E2.notes: No E1 recorded — first Phase 3 estimate. outerLoopFocusH provided directly by operator (2–3h range; 2.5h midpoint used for p75 derivation). Phase 2 anomaly excluded as calibration anchor.

openPRsNote: Reconciled 2026-04-17: no open PRs on origin (craigfo/skills-repo). Prior entries (#66, #67) merged as commits 6d622de and 02d637d. /improvement write-back branch merged as PR #99 (commit 5840910). GitHub agent dispatch PRs (#89–#92) confirmed closed by operator.

checkpoint.contextAtWrite: /definition-of-ready complete for all 10 engine-consolidation stories. Outer loop sequence (discovery → benefit-metric → definition → review → test-plan → DoR) done. 20 DoR artefacts landed (10 checklists + 10 contracts). W4 RISK-ACCEPT logged in /decisions 2026-04-17. All 10 stories at stage=definition-of-ready / dorStatus=signed-off in pipeline-state.json. Branch feature/engine-consolidation-outer-loop.
checkpoint.resumeInstruction: Outer loop complete. Next pipeline step: inner coding loop per story. Order: /branch-setup → /implementation-plan → /subagent-execution (or /tdd per task) → /verify-completion → /branch-complete. Per /decisions Q1, the 7 migration stories (ec1.1–ec1.7) run on parallel branches; ec2.1, ec2.2, ec3.1 independent. Recommended inner-loop order: start ec3.1 (pipeline-state isolation) first since AC0 audit may surface localised patches that other branches should absorb; or start ec1.3 (smallest — single subfile, single test) as a smoke test of the move-only pattern. ec2.1 subsection 7 must coordinate with ec3.1 merge order (AC1a sequencing guard).
pendingActions: Pick inner-loop starting point: ec3.1 (de-risks AC0 audit) OR ec1.3 (smallest migration, pattern smoke test) OR ec2.2 (smallest docs edit).
Before ec3.1 inner loop: operator captures legacy pipeline-state.json snapshot as tests/fixtures/pipeline-state-legacy.json so AC2's union-equality test has a baseline.
Coordinate ec2.1 merge order with ec3.1 (subsection 7 sequencing per AC1a).
Carry-forward from prior session — confirm item 7: create docs/conflict-resolution-guide.md (two PR merge conflict patterns).
Carry-forward from prior session — confirm item 8: second-session verification prompt placement (A lightweight / B moderate / C structural).
